steps.title: Identify the key evidence
steps.content: The passage presents archaeological evidence: both clam size and abundance increased in the area where the ancestors' terraced garden practice was used.

steps.title: Apply the evidence to the conclusion
steps.content:
Size increase indicates robustness; abundance increase indicates effective maintenance of the food source—exactly what Choice D — the practice used by ancestors of modern Kwakwaka'wakw people not only effectively maintained a food source but also promoted its robustness. claims.

The other choices either compare to absent evidence, introduce undiscussed information, or make claims about current practice unsupported by the text.

That matches Choice D — the practice used by ancestors of modern Kwakwaka'wakw people not only effectively maintained a food source but also promoted its robustness..
